title: NANA Bakery — Lemon loaf & poppy seed roll, delivered or for pick up
description: Home-baked lemon loaf and poppy seed roll in Nanaimo, BC. Door delivery or pick up. Order by email.

hero.headline: Lemon loaf & poppy seed roll, baked at home
hero.subheadline: Two favourites from our Nanaimo kitchen — door delivery or pick up, your choice.

about.title: Baked with care, delivered with love
paragraphs: NANA Bakery is a home kitchen crafting small batches of lemon loaf and poppy seed roll for neighbours across Nanaimo.
We source ingredients from Vancouver Island and British Columbia whenever possible — so every bake tells a local story.
No storefront — choose door delivery anywhere in Nanaimo, or pick up from our home kitchen at a time we arrange together.

fulfillment.title: Door delivery or pick up
fulfillment.subtitle: Two easy ways to enjoy fresh baking in Nanaimo.

delivery.title: Door delivery
delivery.description: We bring your order straight to your door anywhere in Nanaimo. Perfect when you'd rather stay cozy at home.

pickup.title: Pick up
pickup.description: Collect your order from our home kitchen. We'll confirm a convenient time when you email us.
